title: Senior Teacher - Oliveboard Holdings Services - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Oliveboard Holdings Services - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Join the Oliveboard Holdings Services family as a Senior Teacher in Pimpri-Chinchwad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Oliveboard Holdings Services:
Oliveboard Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oliveboard Holdings Services!
